summary: Made two surgical seam edits: the opening now explicitly carries forward the dawn laundry handoff from chapter 8 into the reserve-cache drop, and the ending now places Elise on the rope in the print chamber so chapter 10's press move begins in cleaner continuity. Core beats, causality, and dialogue register remain unchanged.
edits: Linked the reserve-cache packet to the damp washing bundle Clemence handed Elise before dawn.
Extended the closing beat into the print chamber so Elise is already pulling on the rope before the next chapter opens on the dismantling.
